findings.title: DIVIDE-BEFORE-MULTIPLY precision loss
findings.snippet: multiplication (price / 100) * discount. Due to the fact that Solidity truncates integers
findings.note: divide-before-multiply -> precision loss (the divide truncates first); reorder to multiply first
